task_completion.description: Verify that a segmentation mask has been created for the brain tumor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A colored segmentation overlay (mask) is visible on the FLAIR MRI slices in the 3D Slicer 2D/3D viewers.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 3D bounding box dimensions (width, depth, height) are recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displays the contents of the output file, showing three numerical values representing the width, depth, and height of the bounding box in mm.

task_completion.description: Verify that the bounding box volume is calculated and recorded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The same output file contains a numerical value representing the bounding volume of the tumor.

task_completion.description: Verify that the reported dimensions and volume are derived from actual measurements in the software.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Segment Statistics module (or similar measurement tool) is visible in 3D Slicer, and the numbers in the output text file match the calculated statistics on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the measurements are saved to the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, terminal, or text editor shows the file saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/tumor_bbox_measurements.txt'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the 3D Slicer GUI to perform the segmentation and measurements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with 3D Slicer's Segment Editor and Segment Statistics modules, rather than just a terminal script bypassing the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the text file contains actual numerical values and not placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The output file contains specific numbers (e.g., '45.2 mm') rather than generic text like 'width, depth, height'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not simply copy the ground truth files.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening or copying files directly from '/var/lib/slicer/ground_truth' to generate the answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Data directory: /home/ga/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS. Output file: /home/ga/Documents/SlicerData/BraTS/tumor_bbox_measurements.txt. Ground truth directory: /var/lib/slicer/ground_truth. The agent must measure the 3D bounding box dimensions and volume of the tumor and save them to the output file. The dimensions should be within a 15% tolerance of the ground truth.
